name: Parental Consent for Child Travel & Passports
description: A formal letter of consent from a parent or legal guardian allowing a minor child to travel internationally or apply for a passport.
content:
PARENTAL CONSENT FOR TRAVEL AND PASSPORT ISSUANCE

TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN:

I, THE UNDERSIGNED PARENT/GUARDIAN:
Full Name: {{parent_name}}
ID / Passport No: {{parent_id}}
Address: {{parent_address}}
Contact Number: {{parent_phone}}

DO HEREBY DECLARE THAT I AM THE LAWFUL PARENT / LEGAL GUARDIAN OF:
Child's Full Name: {{child_name}}
Child's Date of Birth: {{formatDate child_dob}}
Child's ID / Passport No: {{child_id}}

AND I DO HEREBY GIVE MY EXPRESS CONSENT AND PERMISSION FOR THE ABOVE-NAMED CHILD TO:

  • Apply for, renew, and/or be issued a national passport or travel document.
  • Travel internationally {{#if accompanying_adult}}under the supervision and accompaniment of: {{accompanying_adult}}.{{else}}as an unaccompanied minor.{{/if}}
{{#if travel_destination}}

Specific Travel Details (If applicable):
Destination Country/Countries: {{travel_destination}}
Expected Dates of Travel: {{travel_dates}}

{{/if}}

I confirm that I possess the legal authority to grant this consent. I authorize the above actions freely, voluntarily, and without any coercion.

Date Signed: {{formatDate signature_date}}

Signature of Parent / Guardian

{{parent_name}}


_________________________

Note to the Signatory: For international travel, border control authorities generally require this document to be formally notarized by a Notary Public.

fields.name: accompanying_adult
fields.label: Accompanying Adult (Leave blank if traveling alone)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Mother Jane Doe, Coach John Smith
